panels.title: Ships Now
panels.description: Unique vessels seen in the last 60 seconds

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(mmsi) as count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 60 SECOND

panels.title: Messages / min
panels.description: AIS messages received per minute (last 5 min avg)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() / 5 as msg_per_min FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT uniq(mmsi) as count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT count() as total FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, uniq(mmsi) AS ships FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS messages FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Ship Types
panels.description: Vessel types seen (from static data messages)

targets.rawSql: SELECT dictGetOrDefault('ais.ship_types', 'name', toUInt64(ship_type), concat('Type ', toString(ship_type))) AS type_name, uniq(mmsi) AS count FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ship_type IS NOT NULL AND ship_type > 0 GROUP BY type_name ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Recent Ships
panels.description: Last 20 vessels with enriched names from ship_latest

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.mmsi, sl.ship_name AS name, sl.callsign AS callsign, dictGetOrDefault('ais.ship_types', 'name', toUInt64(coalesce(sl.ship_type, 0)), '') AS type, round(anyLast(p.speed), 1) AS speed_kts, round(anyLast(p.course), 0) AS course_deg, round(anyLast(p.lat), 4) AS lat, round(anyLast(p.lon), 4) AS lon, count() AS msgs, max(p.timestamp) AS last_seen FROM ais.positions AS p LEFT JOIN (SELECT mmsi, ship_name, callsign, ship_type FROM ais.ship_latest FINAL) AS sl ON p.mmsi = sl.mmsi WHERE p.timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE GROUP BY p.mmsi, sl.ship_name, sl.callsign, sl.ship_type ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT speed FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND speed IS NOT NULL AND speed > 0 AND speed < 50

panels.title: Speed Traces (Top 5 Ships)
panels.description: Speed over time for the 5 most active vessels in the last hour

targets.rawSql: WITH top_ships AS (SELECT mmsi FROM ais.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND speed IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mmsi ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5), ship_names AS (SELECT mmsi, ship_name FROM ais.ship_latest FINAL WHERE mmsi IN (SELECT mmsi FROM top_ships)) SELECT p.timestamp AS time, p.speed AS value, concat(toString(p.mmsi), coalesce(concat(' (', sn.ship_name, ')'), '')) AS metric FROM ais.positions AS p LEFT JOIN ship_names AS sn ON p.mmsi = sn.mmsi WHERE p.timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND p.mmsi IN (SELECT mmsi FROM top_ships) AND p.speed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

panels.title: Ship Positions — Live
panels.description: Current ship positions from the last 5 minutes, centered on Piraeus

targets.rawSql: SELECT mmsi, ship_name, lat, lon, speed, course, last_seen, dictGetOrDefault('ais.ship_types', 'name', toUInt64(coalesce(ship_type, 0)), 'Unknown') AS type_name FROM ais.ship_latest FINAL WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lon IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Ships by Zone
panels.description: Active vessels per geographic zone (last 5 minutes)

targets.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(lat >= 37.93 AND lat <= 37.96 AND lon >= 23.60 AND lon <= 23.66, 'Piraeus Port', lat >= 37.90 AND lat <= 37.96 AND lon >= 23.48 AND lon <= 23.58, 'Salamina Strait', lat >= 38.01 AND lat <= 38.06 AND lon >= 23.48 AND lon <= 23.56, 'Elefsina Bay', lat >= 37.50 AND lat <= 38.10 AND lon >= 23.20 AND lon <= 24.00, 'Saronic Open', 'Unknown') AS zone, uniq(mmsi) AS ships FROM ais.ship_latest FINAL WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lon IS NOT NULL GROUP BY zone ORDER BY ships DESC
